description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wood filing cabinet with a smooth, polished finish and subtle wood grain texture. The cabinet features a flat top surface with a single, small metallic knob or handle centrally positioned, suggesting a top-opening mechanism. The front face displays two visible metallic hinges, indicating that the lid can be lifted open from this side. The overall construction appears sturdy and boxy, with clean, sharp edges and a uniform coloration throughout. There are no visible label holders or drawer separations, implying a single-compartment design. The metallic components contrast with the rich brown wood, adding a touch of functional detail to the otherwise minimalist appearance.
description: A dark wood, box-shaped filing cabinet with a central metallic knob and visible hinges, featuring a smooth, polished finish and a single-compartment design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic knob on top and two visible hinges, highlighting the opening mechanism.
description_view_1: Side view with the knob visible on the top surface, no hinges or other features apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view with only the wood grain and the knob visible, no hinges or other hardware present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the knob on top and a seamless wooden surface.
